name: fetch-anon-profile
description: Fetches an anonymous customer profile from Tealium Moments API using tealium_visitor_id.

profileApiUrl.description: Full Tealium Moments API URL for the anonymous profile endpoint to call.

tealiumVisitorId.description: The pseudonymous tealium_visitor_id cookie value used to look up the anonymous visitor profile.

profile.description: Anonymous visitor profile data from Tealium, or a fallback message if unavailable.
